name: Pecan Corn Bread Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
Suggestion: Use a cornbread recipe made just with cornmeal or using rice flour for a no gluten recipe.
Mix all the ingredients together in a bowl. Stuff into poultry or transfer to a lightly oiled casserole. Bake at 350°F oven for 15 minutes if not used as a stuffing. Stuff 2 Cornish hens or 3 pound chicken.
1/8 recipe - 168 calories, 1 bread, 1 vegetable, 1 fat exchange
22 grams carbohydrate, 3 grams protein, 6 grams fat
202 mg sodium, 110 mg potassium, 23 mg cholesterol
